title: Create: Hangars (Aeronautics)
description: An addon for Create: Aeronautics that adds procedurally generated hangars to your world.
body:
# Create: Hangars
This is an addon for Create: Aeronautics. **Make sure to have the required dependencies installed.**

This addon adds procedurally generated hangar structures to your world. They contain loot to help get started with not only Create, but also Aeronautics as well. You can find many components and materials and sometimes even fully developed mechanisms inside chests on shelves.
Recommend you use Lootr in multiplayer.


<details>
<summary>Loot you might find</summary>

![3 small cogwheels, 2 andesite alloys, and 1 iron nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6413bd9bd68ff19c330765040a6e7b756c22243.png)

![2 copper sheets, 2 dried kelp, and 1 iron nugget](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97ddfb4a53724024edc6796bbe6bbb826cd3c1e9.png)

![3 springs, and 2 dried kelp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f757b12054de634e6e87b3c4f7b025782b2eb54.png)

![8 windmill sails, 2 springs, and 1 slimeball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12759f4fd6b1b5e16ccdc5e5994782658422afd4.png)


<details>
<summary>All loot possible</summary>

- Iron nugget
- Andesite alloy
- Spring
- Dried Kelp
- Slimeball
- String
- Copper sheet
- Small cogwheel
- Large cogwheel
- Redstone magnet
- Burner
- White envelope block
- White symmetric sail
- White sail

</details>



</details>



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hangar variants include:
- Plains Hangar
- Birch Hangar
- Taiga Hangar
- Dark Oak Hangar
- Cherry Hangar
- Jungle Hangar
- Bamboo Hangar (rarer variant of jungle)
- Savannah Hangar

Possibly more in the future.

This pack was inspired by a hangar made by [Askidelta](https://guns.lol/aski)
